name: libio-interactive-perl
title: libio-interactive-perl
description:
utility module for interactive I/O
IO::Interactive provides three utility subroutines that make it easier to
develop interactive applications: is_interactive, interactive and busy.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libio-interactive-perl because utility module for interactive I/O.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libio-interactive-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libio-interactive-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libio-interactive-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
